overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} F \left( \begin{array}{c} a + u \\ b + v \end{array} \right) = \frac {1}{\big (f (a) + f ^ {\prime} (a) u + f ^ {\prime \prime} (a) u ^ {2} / 2 + o (u ^ {2}) \big) + \big (f (b) + f ^ {\prime} (b) v + f ^ {\prime \prime} (b) v ^ {2} / 2 + o (v ^ {2}) \big)} \\ = \overbrace {\frac {1}{f (a) + f (b)}} ^ {\text {a constant}} \overbrace \frac {1}{1 + \frac {f ^ {\prime} (a) u + f ^ {\prime \prime} (a) u ^ {2} / 2 + f ^ {\prime} (b) v + f ^ {\prime \prime} (b) v ^ {2} / 2}{f (a) + f (b)}} + o (u ^ {2} + v ^ {2}). \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l}\int_ {P} \omega = \int_ {T} \left(y d y \wedge d z + x d x \wedge d z + z d x \wedge d y\right) \binom {P _ {\left(\begin{array}{c}x\\y\\1 - x - y\end{array}\right)}} \overbrace {\left[\begin{array}{c}1\\0\\- 1\end{array}\right]} ^ {\overrightarrow {D _ {1} \gamma}}, \overbrace {\left[\begin{array}{c}0\\1\\- 1\end{array}\right]}\left. \right) | d x d y |\\= \int_ {T} \left(y \det \left[\begin{array}{c c}0&1\\- 1&- 1\end{array}\right] + x \det \left[\begin{array}{c c}1&0\\- 1&- 1\end{array}\right] + (1 - x - y) \det \left[\begin{array}{c c}1&0\\0&1\end{array}\right]\right) | d x d y |\\= \int_ {T} (y - x + 1 - x - y) | d x d y |\\= \int_ {T} (1 - 2 x) | d x d y | = \int_ {0} ^ {1} \left(\int_ {0} ^ {1 - y} (1 - 2 x) d x\right) d y\\= \int_ {0} ^ {1} [ x - x ^ {2} ] _ {0} ^ {1 - y} d y = \int_ {0} ^ {1} (y - y ^ {2}) d y = \left[ \frac {y ^ {2}}{2} - \frac {y ^ {3}}{3} \right] _ {0} ^ {1} = \frac {1}{6}.\end{array}\tag {6.4.33}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l}\int_ {P} \omega = \int_ {T} \left(y d y \wedge d z + x d x \wedge d z + z d x \wedge d y\right) \left( P _ {\left(\begin{array}{c}x\\y\\1 - x - y\end{array}\right)}, \overbrace {\left[\begin{array}{c}1\\0\\- 1\end{array}\right]} ^ {\overrightarrow {D _ {1} \gamma}}, \overbrace {\left[\begin{array}{c}0\\1\\- 1\end{array}\right]}\right) | d x d y |\\= \int_ {T} \left(y \det \left[\begin{array}{c c}0&1\\- 1&- 1\end{array}\right] + x \det \left[\begin{array}{c c}1&0\\- 1&- 1\end{array}\right] + (1 - x - y) \det \left[\begin{array}{c c}1&0\\0&1\end{array}\right]\right) | d x d y |\\= \int_ {T} (y - x + 1 - x - y) | d x d y |\\= \int_ {T} (1 - 2 x) | d x d y | = \int_ {0} ^ {1} \left(\int_ {0} ^ {1 - y} (1 - 2 x) d x\right) d y\\= \int_ {0} ^ {1} [ x - x ^ {2} ] _ {0} ^ {1 - y} d y = \int_ {0} ^ {1} (y - y ^ {2}) d y = \left[ \frac {y ^ {2}}{2} - \frac {y ^ {3}}{3} \right] _ {0} ^ {1} = \frac {1}{6}.\end{array}\tag {6.4.33}
